clues.clue: This 'wear-and-tear' joint disease is the most common form of arthritis and worsens with age.
This autoimmune arthritis symmetrically attacks the joint lining; it's abbreviated RA.
This condition of weakened, low-density bone raises fracture risk, especially after 50.
Caused by uric-acid crystals, this painful arthritis classically flares in the big toe.
A bulging or ruptured cushion between vertebrae pressing on a nerve is a 'herniated' one of these.
The spine is built from 33 of these stacked bones.
This is the longest and strongest bone in the body, in the thigh.
This smooth connective tissue caps the ends of bones and wears away in arthritis.
These tough bands connect bone to bone and are often torn in knee injuries.
The five-vertebra lower-back region of the spine is called this.
A leading cause of missed work, pain in the lower spine, eventually affects most adults.
For arthritis sufferers, joint stiffness is usually worst at this time of day.
Pain shooting down the leg from a pinched lower-spine nerve is this.
The grinding or popping sensation felt in a worn joint is this 'crep-' term.
Numbness and tingling in the hand from a compressed wrist nerve is this 'tunnel' syndrome.
This radiation-based imaging quickly reveals broken bones.
A 'DEXA' scan measures this to diagnose osteoporosis.
Ibuprofen and naproxen belong to this class of nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory pain relievers.
Swapping a worn hip or knee for an artificial implant is this 'arthro-' surgery.
This guided program of exercises and stretches, abbreviated PT, restores movement after injury.
This mineral, paired with vitamin D, builds and maintains strong bones.
Made in the skin from sunlight, this vitamin is needed to absorb calcium.
Activities like walking and lifting strengthen bone by loading it; this is 'weight-bearing' what?
Lifting with the legs and sitting upright protect the spine by maintaining good this.
Quitting this habit improves bone density and joint health, among many other benefits.

final.clue: Often torn by athletes who pivot suddenly, this knee ligament is abbreviated ACL.
